/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.15 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/psmovepair.dir/src/utils/psmovepair.c.o -o psmovepair   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/maksymiliantonak/Documents/code/psmoveapi/build libpsmoveapi.dylib -lhidapi -framework Foundation -framework AVFoundation -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework IOBluetooth
